notes: Wikipedia article (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Woodward_Park_City) returned 404 — no article exists. SkiCentral does not list this resort. Skiresort.info reports slope length in km rather than trail count, so trails_total is null. Woodward Park City is primarily an action-sports / freestyle training facility (terrain parks, halfpipes, indoor training), not a traditional alpine resort, which explains the very small 0.5 km of groomed slopes and the absence of a conventional trail count in regional databases. Difficulty % derived from skiresort.info slope-length breakdown (Easy→beginner, Intermediate→intermediate, Difficult→advanced/expert split 0/0). Source classifies difficulty by slope distance, not by individual trail count.

notes: Wikipedia (en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yellowstone_Club) confirms private-club status and mentions '2200 acres for skiing' plus Pioneer Ridge 'double black expert runs and challenging chutes', but provides no trail count or % breakdown. SkiCentral Montana listing does not include Yellowstone Club (private members-only club, often omitted from public directories). Powderhounds returned 403. Skiresort.info reports slope length in km rather than trail count, so trails_total is null. Difficulty % from skiresort.info slope-length breakdown (Easy→beginner, Intermediate→intermediate, Difficult mapped to advanced; expert kept 0 since source only provides 3-tier split). Source classifies difficulty by slope distance, not individual trail count.
